zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth於大約1575年出生在英國多瑟特卡迪斯托可。她於1595年之前與John Mayo在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年8月21日在英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于大约1575年出生在英国多瑟特卡迪斯托可。她于1595年之前与John Mayo在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年8月21日在英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 曼德維爾享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born about 1575, in Cattistock, Dorset, England. She married John Mayo before 1595, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 21 August 1603, in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth est née environ 1575, à Cattistock, Dorset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Mayo avant 1595, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1603, à Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth wurde um 1575 in Cattistock, Dorset, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1595 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom John Mayo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1603 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth è nata il circa 1575 nel Cattistock, Dorset, England. Lei sposato John Mayo prima del 1595, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 agosto 1603, nel Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは約1575年にイギリスドールセトカッティストックで生まれた。1595年以前にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでJohn Mayoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年8月21日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ マンデヴィルで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 대략 1575년 영국 도르세트 카티스톡에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1595년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 John Mayo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 8월 21일 영국 노르섬프토실르 소 먼데빌에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu aproximadamente 1575, em Cattistock, Dorset, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Mayo antes 1595, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1603, em Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась около 1575 г. в местности каттистокк, дорсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mayo перед 1595 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 августа 1603 г. в местности таурп мандевилл, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nació aproximadamente 1575, en Cattistock, Dorset, Inglaterra. Se casó con John Mayo antes de 1595, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1603, en Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
